sections.paragraph:
Ἰωήλ, ὁ indecl. (יוֹאֵל) Joel, the OT prophet. τὸ εἰρημένον διὰ τοῦ προφήτου Ἰωήλ (i.e. Jo 3:1–5a) Ac 2:16.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

OT OT = Old Testament

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 486
